title: helichrysum bellidioides
intro: Helichrysum bellidioides, also known as the annual Helichrysum, is a small, daisy-like flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Helichrysum bellidioides include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
